clusters.title: What to know about California chemical tank set to explode or leak
clusters.neutral_headline: California Chemical Tank Leak Prompts Evacuations

items.title: What to know about California chemical tank set to explode or leak
items.standfirst: The tank at GKN Aerospace is estimated to contain 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate, a volatile chemical used to produce plastics.
items.content: The tank at GKN Aerospace is estimated to contain 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate, a volatile chemical used to produce plastics.

items.title: 5/24: CBS Weekend News
items.standfirst: Crack in California chemical tank a positive sign, but explosion fears remain; details emerging on potential U.S.-Iran peace deal.
items.content: Crack in California chemical tank a positive sign, but explosion fears remain; details emerging on potential U.S.-Iran peace deal.

items.title: Crack in California chemical tank a positive sign, but explosion fears remain
items.standfirst: Officials say an industrial tank in Southern California containing about 7,000 gallons of highly flammable and toxic chemicals appears to have cracked. Experts say that could mean a rupture or catastrophic explosion may be averted. Thousands have been evacuated from several communities in Orange County. Lana Zak reports.
items.content: Officials say an industrial tank in Southern California containing about 7,000 gallons of highly flammable and toxic chemicals appears to have cracked. Experts say that could mean a rupture or catastrophic explosion may be averted. Thousands have been evacuated from several communities in Orange County. Lana Zak reports.

items.title: California declares state of emergency after toxic leak threatens 40,000 residents
items.standfirst: California authorities said on Sunday they had discovered a crack in a damaged tank containing toxic chemicals, easing fears over a potential explosion that earlier prompted the evacuation of about 40,000 residents. The leak began on Friday in Orange County's Garden Grove area, sending fumes across a densely populated region near Disneyland.
items.content: California authorities said on Sunday they had discovered a crack in a damaged tank containing toxic chemicals, easing fears over a potential explosion that earlier prompted the evacuation of about 40,000 residents. The leak began on Friday in Orange County's Garden Grove area, sending fumes across a densely populated region near Disneyland.

items.title: California chemical tank has cracked, causing state of emergency, thousands to evacuate
items.standfirst: One California town is in a state of emergency and 50,000 people are under an evacuation order as a malfunctioning chemical tank at an aerospace plant is overheating and could leak or explode.
items.content: One California town is in a state of emergency and 50,000 people are under an evacuation order as a malfunctioning chemical tank at an aerospace plant is overheating and could leak or explode.(Image credit: Apu Gomes)

items.title: California declares emergency as fire crews race to contain toxic leak
items.standfirst: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.
items.content: Thousands have been evacuated as officials warn a tank containing about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode.

items.title: California declares chemical emergency, 40 000 residents ordered out
items.standfirst: About 40,000 Californians were forced to evacuate their homes on Friday following a leak from a chemical storage tank in the southern part of the state. On Saturday, firefighters recorded an increase in the temperature of the hazardous substance, rising from 25°C to 32°C.
items.content: About 40,000 Californians were forced to evacuate their homes on Friday following a leak from a chemical storage tank in the southern part of the state. On Saturday, firefighters recorded an increase in the temperature of the hazardous substance, rising from 25°C to 32°C.

items.title: California declares state of emergency as crews race to contain toxic chemical leak
items.standfirst: Thousands were evacuated after officials warned that a tank holding about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode. [bbc.com]
items.content: Thousands were evacuated after officials warned that a tank holding about 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate could explode. [bbc.com]

items.title: Suspected Ebola cases in eastern DR Congo pass 900 as health workers struggle with aid cuts
items.standfirst: As the number of suspected Ebola cases in the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo pass 900, health workers say that the chaos left by years of fighting and local government failures has been compounded by sweeping cuts to international aid budgets.
items.content: As the number of suspected Ebola cases in the eastern Democratic Republic of Congo pass 900, health workers say that the chaos left by years of fighting and local government failures has been compounded by sweeping cuts to international aid budgets.

items.title: RAF jet flying defence secretary has signal jammed near Russian border

items.content: An RAF jet which the defence secretary was travelling in had its signals jammed as it flew near the Russian border, in what a defence source said was "reckless" interference.

items.title: GPS jammed on RAF jet carrying UK defence secretary close to Russian border
items.standfirst: Russia suspected of obstructing signal on flight bringing John Healey home from visit to British troops in EstoniaAn RAF jet carrying the defence secretary, John Healey, had its signal jammed for the entire three-hour flight after it flew near the Russian border.Healey had been visiting British soldiers in Estonia and was travelling back to the UK when the electronic attack happened, the Times reported. Continue reading...

items.title: Authorities investigate safety lapses after China coal mine blast kills at least 82
items.standfirst: Authorities in northern China were investigating a coal mine operator with a focus on safety lapses as rescuers searched for those missing in the country’s deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years, which killed at least 82 people.
items.content: Authorities in northern China were investigating a coal mine operator with a focus on safety lapses as rescuers searched for those missing in the country’s deadliest coal mine explosion in recent years, which killed at least 82 people.

items.title: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
items.standfirst: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.
items.content: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.

items.title: At least 82 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion
items.standfirst: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.
items.content: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

items.title: China mine death toll at least 82 after gas blast
items.standfirst: Xi Jinping urges authorities to ‘spare no effort’ in rescue operation after explosion in northern Shanxi provinceAt least 82 people have been killed in a gas explosion at a coalmine in northern China’s Shanxi province, in the country’s worst mining disaster in 17 years.The explosion happened on Friday at 7.29pm (12.29 BST) while 247 workers were underground at the Liushenyu coalmine in Qinyuan county, the state media agency Xinhua reported. Continue reading...
items.content: Xi Jinping urges authorities to ‘spare no effort’ in rescue operation after explosion in northern Shanxi provinceAt least 82 people have been killed in a gas explosion at a coalmine in northern China’s Shanxi province, in the country’s worst mining disaster in 17 years.The explosion happened on Friday at 7.29pm (12.29 BST) while 247 workers were underground at the Liushenyu coalmine in Qinyuan county, the state media agency Xinhua reported. Continue reading...

items.title: US: President Trump not harmed and safe after White House shooting
items.standfirst: A gunman opened fire near the White House on Saturday evening before being shot dead by US Secret Service agents in a confrontation that also left a bystander wounded. President Donald Trump, who was inside the White House at the time, was not harmed in the incident.
items.content: A gunman opened fire near the White House on Saturday evening before being shot dead by US Secret Service agents in a confrontation that also left a bystander wounded. President Donald Trump, who was inside the White House at the time, was not harmed in the incident.

clusters.title: Venezuela inmates occupy prison roof and set fire to mattresses to protest alleged abuses

items.title: Venezuela inmates occupy prison roof and set fire to mattresses to protest alleged abuses
items.standfirst: Inmates at Barinas prison allege they were peacefully protesting when prison staff opened fire, leaving some woundedInmates at Venezuela’s western Barinas prison staged a protest on its roof on Sunday, piling flaming mattresses and calling for the removal of the facility’s director, who they accused of overseeing guards as they shot unarmed prisoners.“We want justice. They are shooting us, the guards and the wardens,” a prisoner said in a video shared by the Venezuelan Observatory of Prisons, a local NGO, on X, in which a man is seen with a bullet wound in his chest. Continue reading...

They are shooting us, the guards and the wardens,” a prisoner said in a video shared by the Venezuelan Observatory of Prisons, a local NGO, on X, in which a man is seen with a bullet wound in his chest. Continue reading...

clusters.title: Pope Leo XIV set to release manifesto on AI's ethical risks and global impact
clusters.neutral_headline: Pope To Release Manifesto On AI Ethics

items.title: Pope Leo XIV set to release manifesto on AI's ethical risks and global impact
items.standfirst: Pope Leo XIV on Monday will publish his long-awaited manifesto on artificial intelligence, outlining the Catholic Church’s response to the technology’s ethical and social challenges. The US-born pontiff will personally present the “Magnifica Humanitas” encyclical at the Vatican alongside senior Church officials and leading AI experts, including Anthropic co-founder Dario Amodei.
items.content: Pope Leo XIV on Monday will publish his long-awaited manifesto on artificial intelligence, outlining the Catholic Church’s response to the technology’s ethical and social challenges. The US-born pontiff will personally present the “Magnifica Humanitas” encyclical at the Vatican alongside senior Church officials and leading AI experts, including Anthropic co-founder Dario Amodei.

clusters.title: Senegal parliament speaker steps down as political crisis worsens

items.title: Senegal parliament speaker steps down as political crisis worsens
items.standfirst: The move by speaker El Malick Ndiaye clears the way for sacked premier Ousmane Sonko to run for head of parliament.
items.content: The move by speaker El Malick Ndiaye clears the way for sacked premier Ousmane Sonko to run for head of parliament.

items.title: Senegal parliament speaker El Malick Ndiaye steps down as political crisis deepens
items.standfirst: Senegal's parliamentary speaker El Malick Ndiaye stepped down Sunday, clearing the way for his ally Ousmane Sonko – sacked two days ago by the country's president – to run for his position as the head of parliament. Sonko's Pastef party commands a strong majority in the West African nation's legislature.
items.content: Senegal's parliamentary speaker El Malick Ndiaye stepped down Sunday, clearing the way for his ally Ousmane Sonko – sacked two days ago by the country's president – to run for his position as the head of parliament. Sonko's Pastef party commands a strong majority in the West African nation's legislature.

ai_summary: El Malick Ndiaye steps down as speaker
